creator: lulf@kerneled.org
text:
On søn, aug 06, 2006 at 06:23:30 +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/bazaar,
>

>

I approve the patch.
-- 
Mvh Ulf Lilleengen
